children.text: all forms of entry, appropriation, or disposal under the public land laws;
location, entry, and patent under the mining laws; and
operation under the mineral leasing and geothermal leasing laws.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), W½E½ and W½ sec. 27, T. 23 S., R. 58 E., Mt. Diablo Meridian is not subject to withdrawal under that subsection.

children.heading: Effect of entry under public land laws
children.label: 2 Effect of entry under public land laws
A
children.text: Any Federal land in the Recreation Area that qualifies for conveyance under (commonly known as the “Small Tracts Act”) ( et seq.), which, notwithstanding section 7 of that Act (), may be conveyed under that Act.Public Law 97–46516 U.S.C. 521c16 U.S.C. 521i

children.label: B
children.text: Any Federal land in the Recreation Area that the Secretary determines to be appropriate for conveyance by exchange for non-Federal land within the Recreation Area under authorities generally providing for the exchange of National Forest System land.
